context: Tests whether the Mermaid diagrams skill helps an agent complete the state-lifecycle-repair scenario while following diagram type, syntax, semantic, renderer, safety, and claim-discipline guidance relevant to the task.

checklist.name: Keeps state diagram type
checklist.description: Repairs the diagram as stateDiagram-v2 rather than switching diagram types.

checklist.name: Fixes missing transition label colon
checklist.description: Adds the missing colon before the approve label or otherwise makes that transition valid Mermaid.

checklist.name: Preserves lifecycle semantics
checklist.description: Keeps Draft, In Review, Published, submit, approve, and changes requested semantics.

checklist.name: Explains smallest repair
checklist.description: Explains the minimal syntax change without unrelated rewrites.
